name: Thomas Cushman
body: Praying for Lyla and all of you. Daily you and the family are on our minds and in our conversations with the Lord. That little girl inspires Kelly and me.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Continuing to pray for you all. Wish we lived close enough to scoop Micah up for the next week. ♥

name: Tina Hurst
body: Praying for all of you! May you feel God's presence closer than ever.

name: Tylana Miller
body: Daily I keep you all in my prayers. I admire your positivity and your faith. Hope you get some good news today.

name: Mary West
body: He is holding all of you in His arms and surrounding you with love, mercy, grace and strength.

name: michael tarvin
body: PRAYING! May God's mighty strength sustain you and give you peace through all this. God knows all the needs and your hearts. He is so pleased for sure, with little Lyla's pure love for Jesus. Love y'all ❤️

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Oh Lee, my heart goes out to each of you at this emotionally draining time. Know that I’m praying for y’all’s precious little Lyla, for the medical team as they make their assessment and decisions, for your time together to be so sweet and bonding and memorable, in spite of these difficult times, and for Micah as he stays behind.With love, and prayers interceding for each of you,Charlotte

name: Kathy Laub
body: We have been doing a mini study of the Hynn He Leadeth Me, which is based on Psalm 23. Thinking so much of Lyla through this, especially this verse:"Sometimes mid scenes of deepest gloom, sometimes where Eden's flowers bloom, by waters calm, o'er troubled sea, still 'tis God's hand that leadeth me"He is still there. Praying for you all.
